AI is everywhere. But business impact?
That’s where the real gap begins.
Most enterprises have no single owner for AI deployment. No one who understands both the technology and the business context well enough to bridge them.
The Forward Deployed Engineer fills that gap.
Revature builds this talent and delivers it to your enterprise.
Learn more: revature.com/hire-train-deploy-fde-talent.
